steps.title: Identify the causal signal
steps.content: ”Could not be ______ soil microbes specifically”—the blank must express a causal link. Since the researchers tested whether soil microbes cause flavor variations, the blank means “caused by” or “linked to.”

steps.title: Match the causal relationship
steps.content: ”Attributed to” fits directly—the variations couldn't be attributed to soil microbes means they couldn't be caused by them. The other three shift to different concepts: prevention (forestalled), undermining (subverted), and exclusion (excluded from). That matches choice C — C is correct.
